title: crunchy citrusy ethiopian pak cho tibs
description: a flavorful and crunchy ethiopian-style stir-fry featuring pak choi, onions, and citrus, fodmap-friendly and perfect for meal prep.

ingredients.name: pak choi
ingredients.notes: any color or mix of colors

instructions: heat 1 tbsp of olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
add the sliced onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until they start to caramelize, about 8-10 minutes.
add the chopped lemongrass and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for another 2-3 minutes, stirring to combine.
add the pak choi to the skillet, cooking and stirring until it starts to wilt, about 2-3 minutes.
add the citrus-herb spice blend, crushed red pepper flakes, and chicken broth to the skillet, stirring to combine.
cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the pak choi is tender and the sauce has thickened.
season the tibs with salt and pepper to taste.
garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
